hero.subtitle: Over a decade connecting destinations with safety, comfort, and commitment.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To provide comprehensive door-to-door and corporate specialized transportation solutions, exceeding our clients' expectations through safe, punctual service with high quality standards, operating with a modern fleet and highly qualified human talent.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: By the year 2030, Gestrasing S.A.S. will be recognized as the leading company in mobility and logistics solutions in the region, standing out for its technological innovation, environmental sustainability, and contribution to the economic development of the department.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The core values driving every single one of our routes.

card1.title: Comprehensive Safety
card1.text: Strict maintenance protocols and continuous training to guarantee that every trip is 100% safe.

card2.title: Punctuality
card2.text: We understand that our clients' time is invaluable. We fulfill our schedules with absolute precision.

card3.title: Service Excellence
card3.text: A human, friendly approach, always ready to solve any need for our corporate and private passengers.

hero.subtitle: Specialized door-to-door, corporate, and logistics transportation solutions meeting the highest standards of safety and comfort.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Discover everything Gestrasing has to offer.

intercity.title: Door-to-Door Transportation
intercity.desc: Travel comfortably and safely across our main routes with the finest fleet.

corporate.title: Corporate Transportation
corporate.desc: Tailor-made solutions for staff and executive transfers.

parcels.title: Shipping & Parcels
parcels.desc: Your packages reach their destination quickly, safely, and fully tracked.

pets.title: Pet Transportation
pets.desc: We understand pets are part of the family. We offer specialized relocation services for dogs and cats.

hero.title: Specialized Transportation Solutions
hero.subtitle: Learn in detail about our business lines designed to provide supreme comfort and safety.

intercity.heading: Door-to-Door Service
intercity.description: We connect Villavicencio and the capital with a state-of-the-art fleet. Our dispatches are structured to guarantee punctuality and safety for every passenger.

corporate.heading: Corporate Solutions
corporate.description: We provide specialized transportation services for companies and corporate events. We adapt to your organization's itineraries to mobilize your personnel with total efficiency.

fleet.title: Our Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Meet the vehicles that make every trip possible. Comfort, safety, and technology on every route.

hero.title: Additional Services
hero.subtitle: Discover our regional logistics and tourism solutions.

parcels.title: Shipping & Parcels
parcels.desc: Express courier and parcel service between our operated destinations. We guarantee the integrity of your shipments with live tracking and optimized delivery times.

tours.title: Tours & Experiences
tours.desc: Forget about the steering wheel, traffic stress, and finding a designated driver. Very soon we will launch a comprehensive VIP experience: we pick you up in Bogotá, take you to your hotel in Villavicencio, transport you to the best tourist spots, nightlife venues, and bring you safely back home. You just focus on enjoying yourself; Gestrasing takes care of all the logistics.
features: Full round trip: Bogotá - Villavicencio - Bogotá.
Door-to-door transportation to and from your hotel.
Designated driver 24/7 for your party nights.
Routes to the most iconic tourist attractions.

pets.title: Pet Transportation
pets.desc: We understand pets are part of the family. We offer specialized transfer services for dogs and cats under strict animal safety and welfare standards, ensuring they travel just as comfortably as you do.

home.title: Gestrasing S.A.S. | Door-to-Door & Corporate Transportation
home.desc: Leading specialized door-to-door, corporate, and logistics transportation solutions in Meta and Colombia. Comfort, safety, and punctuality.

about.title: About Us | Gestrasing S.A.S.
about.desc: Learn about our history, mission, and the corporate values that make us the leading mobility and logistics company in the region.

services.title: Our Services | Gestrasing S.A.S.
services.desc: We offer specialized Door-to-Door, corporate, and logistics transportation with high safety standards, punctuality, and a modern fleet.

additional.title: Additional Services | Gestrasing S.A.S.
additional.desc: Discover our comprehensive solutions: parcel shipping, safe pet transportation, and guided tourism tours across the Llanos region.
